    • Active Skill

    • Activation Medium Skill

    • Modularization Skill

    • Gear Empowerment

    • Outfit

    • RU Русский

Flame Jet

SS12Season
20
Flame Jet
Spell Fire Area Persistent Projectile Parabolic Terra
Main Stat:
Intelligence
Mana Cost
8
Cast Speed
1 s
Cooldown
0.5 s
Simple
Casts the skill and conjures a Flame Terra at the target location, dealing 611 Persistent Fire Damage per second.
The Flame Terra erupts at regular intervals, dealing 231-428 Spell Fire Damage to enemies in it.
When the Flame Terra erupts, it locks onto enemies within a certain area and fires one Fire Bomb at them, dealing 231-428 Spell Fire Damage on hit.
When the skill consumes Terra Charges, the number of Fire Bombs increases.
Details
Flame Terra:
Flame Terra lasts for 3s.
Deals 611 Persistent Fire Damage every second for 2s.
For each 1 Terra Charge consumed, erupts Projectiles one more time in the duration.
Fire Terra Eruption:
Deals 231-428 Spell Fire Damage.
Fire Bomb:
Deals 231-428 Spell Fire Damage.
Damage Over Time statuses inflicted by the skill can't be spread (excludes Ailments)
The maximum stack of Terra Charge is 1.
Gain 1 stack of Terra Charge per 0.5 second.
This skill's max base Terra quantity is 1.
Projectiles from this skill cannot Split
Damage Over Time statuses inflicted by the skill can't be spread (excludes Ailments)
SS11Season
20
Flame Jet
Spell Fire Area Persistent Projectile Parabolic Terra
Main Stat:
Intelligence
Mana Cost
8
Cast Speed
1 s
Cooldown
0.5 s
Simple
Casts the skill and conjures a Flame Terra at the target location, dealing 611 Persistent Fire Damage per second.
The Flame Terra erupts at regular intervals, dealing 231-428 Spell Fire Damage to enemies in it.
When the Flame Terra erupts, it locks onto enemies within a certain area and fires one Fire Bomb at them, dealing 231-428 Spell Fire Damage on hit.
When the skill consumes Terra Charges, the number of Fire Bombs increases.
Details
Flame Terra:
Flame Terra lasts for 3s.
Deals 611 Persistent Fire Damage every second for 2s.
For each 1 Terra Charge consumed, erupts Projectiles one more time in the duration.
Fire Terra Eruption:
Deals 231-428 Spell Fire Damage.
Fire Bomb:
Deals 231-428 Spell Fire Damage.
Damage Over Time statuses inflicted by the skill can't be spread (excludes Ailments)
The maximum stack of Terra Charge is 1.
Gain 1 stack of Terra Charge per 0.5 second.
This skill's max base Terra quantity is 1.
Projectiles from this skill cannot Split
Damage Over Time statuses inflicted by the skill can't be spread (excludes Ailments)
Alts
  • Flame Jet
  • Flame Jet: Burst (Magnificent)
  • Flame Jet: Scorched Earth (Magnificent)
  • Flame Jet: Offshoot (Noble)
  • Flame Jet: Furnace (Noble)
    • Skill Shop Unlock Level
    Info

    Progression /40

    Big Elven Fountain

    Big Elven Fountain
    [Skill Effect] Flame Jet
    The silent Elven Fountain starts to roar.

    Flame Jet

    Flame Jet
    Conjures a Fire Terra at the target location at regular intervals. Eruptions lock onto enemy units in an area and hurl a Projectile at the targets. The Projectile that falls on the ground forms a small Fire Terra on the spot.
    Sites
    • poedb.tw
    • tlidb.com
    • poe2db.tw
    • paldb.cc
    About Site
    • Privacy
    • About US
    Community
    The site is based on beta testing data, not the final official release. This site is fan-made and not affiliated with XD in any way.
